requirement_topic.en: Lithium Battery Transport — UN 38.3 and International Dangerous Goods Rules
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电池运输 — UN 38.3 及国际危险货物规则
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電池運輸 — UN 38.3 及國際危險貨物規則

summary.en: Lithium-ion batteries transported to Japan by air or sea must comply with international dangerous goods transport regulations. UN 38.3 (UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Section 38.3) testing is mandatory for lithium batteries transported internationally, verifying safety under altitude simulation, thermal, vibration, shock, external short circuit, impact, overcharge, and forced discharge conditions. For air transport, IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR) apply; for sea transport, IMDG Code (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code) applies. Japan's Civil Aeronautics Act and Maritime Act incorporate these international standards. Large-capacity BESS modules shipped in bulk must be classified and declared as dangerous goods under appropriate UN numbers (UN 3480 for lithium-ion batteries shipped alone, UN 3481 for batteries in or with equipment).
summary.zh: 通过空运或海运运往日本的锂离子电池须符合国际危险货物运输法规。UN 38.3（联合国试验和标准手册第38.3节）测试是国际运输锂电池的强制要求，验证电池在模拟高空、热、振动、冲击、外部短路、撞击、过充和强制放电条件下的安全性。空运适用国际航空运输协会危险品规则（IATA DGR），海运适用国际海运危险货物规则（IMDG Code）。日本《航空法》和《海事法》纳入了上述国际标准。批量装运的大容量BESS模组须按相应UN编号（单独装运锂离子电池为UN 3480，装于设备中或与设备同运为UN 3481）申报为危险货物。
summary.zht: 通過空運或海運運往日本的鋰離子電池須符合國際危險貨物運輸法規。UN 38.3（聯合國試驗和標準手冊第38.3節）測試是國際運輸鋰電池的強制要求，驗證電池在模擬高空、熱、振動、衝擊、外部短路、撞擊、過充和強制放電條件下的安全性。空運適用國際航空運輸協會危險品規則（IATA DGR），海運適用國際海運危險貨物規則（IMDG Code）。日本《航空法》和《海事法》納入了上述國際標準。批量裝運的大容量BESS模組須按相應UN編號（單獨裝運鋰離子電池為UN 3480，裝於設備中或與設備同運為UN 3481）申報為危險貨物。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 — United Nations Manual of Tests and Criteria, Section 38.3 (Lithium Battery Transport Testing)
IATA DGR — International Air Transport Association Dangerous Goods Regulations (air transport)
IMDG Code — International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code (sea transport)
航空法 (Civil Aeronautics Act), Japan — incorporates IATA DGR
海事法 / 船舶安全法 (Maritime Safety Act), Japan — incorporates IMDG Code

summary.en: China requires UN 38.3 testing for lithium batteries exported internationally, consistent with international requirements. Chinese exporters shipping to Japan must obtain UN 38.3 test reports from accredited testing laboratories, prepare the required Safety Data Sheet (SDS), and comply with IATA DGR (air) or IMDG Code (sea) packaging, labelling, and declaration requirements. UN 38.3 is the same international standard on both sides; the gap is in ensuring complete, current test documentation and correct dangerous-goods declaration for each specific battery configuration shipped.
summary.zh: 中国要求出口锂电池取得UN 38.3测试报告，与国际要求一致。向日本出货的中国出口商须从经认可的测试实验室取得UN 38.3测试报告，准备所需安全数据表（SDS），并符合IATA DGR（空运）或IMDG Code（海运）的包装、标识和申报要求。UN 38.3是两国均适用的同一国际标准；差距在于确保每批次具体电池配置均有完整、最新的测试文件及正确的危险货物申报。
summary.zht: 中國要求出口鋰電池取得UN 38.3測試報告，與國際要求一致。向日本出貨的中國出口商須從經認可的測試實驗室取得UN 38.3測試報告，準備所需安全數據表（SDS），並符合IATA DGR（空運）或IMDG Code（海運）的包裝、標識和申報要求。UN 38.3是兩國均適用的同一國際標準；差距在於確保每批次具體電池配置均有完整、最新的測試文件及正確的危險貨物申報。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 — 联合国试验和标准手册第38.3节 (same international standard)
GB/T 31485-2015 — 电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求及试验方法 (reference; not a transport standard)

gap.en: UN 38.3 is the same international standard on both sides; however, Chinese BESS exporters must ensure they hold valid, battery-configuration-specific UN 38.3 test reports from an accredited laboratory for each product variant being shipped. Reports must cover the exact cell chemistry, capacity, and configuration (cell, module, pack) being transported. Large BESS modules may have mass and capacity limitations under IATA DGR that require special approvals for air shipment. Sea shipment under IMDG Code is more commonly used for large modules. Correct UN number assignment, SDS preparation, and dangerous-goods packaging must be verified for each shipment.
gap.zh: UN 38.3是两国均适用的同一国际标准；但中国BESS出口商须确保为每种出货产品型号持有来自认可实验室、针对具体电池配置有效的UN 38.3测试报告。报告须覆盖所运输电池的确切化学体系、容量和配置（电芯、模组、电池组）。大型BESS模组在IATA DGR下可能受质量和容量限制，空运须取得特别批准。大型模组通常采用IMDG Code框架下的海运方式。每批次货物须核验正确的UN编号分配、SDS准备和危险货物包装。
gap.zht: UN 38.3是兩國均適用的同一國際標準；但中國BESS出口商須確保為每種出貨產品型號持有來自認可實驗室、針對具體電池配置有效的UN 38.3測試報告。報告須覆蓋所運輸電池的確切化學體系、容量和配置（電芯、模組、電池組）。大型BESS模組在IATA DGR下可能受質量和容量限制，空運須取得特別批准。大型模組通常採用IMDG Code框架下的海運方式。每批次貨物須核驗正確的UN編號分配、SDS準備和危險貨物包裝。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for all international shipments of lithium batteries (air: IATA DGR; sea: IMDG Code); UN 38.3 test report mandatory prerequisite
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for international export shipments; UN 38.3 required; IATA DGR / IMDG Code apply to outbound shipments

source.publisher: Ministry of Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism (MLIT), Japan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 transport testing is required for all lithium battery shipments to Japan. Chinese exporters must hold valid, battery-configuration-specific UN 38.3 test reports and comply with IATA DGR (air) or IMDG Code (sea) for each shipment. This is the same international standard applied on both sides; the practical gap is documentation currency and correct dangerous-goods declaration per shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 所有向日本出货的锂电池均须取得UN 38.3运输测试认证。中国出口商须持有针对具体电池配置有效的UN 38.3测试报告，并对每批次货物符合IATA DGR（空运）或IMDG Code（海运）要求。此为两国均适用的同一国际标准；实际差距在于文件的时效性和每批次货物的正确危险货物申报。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 所有向日本出貨的鋰電池均須取得UN 38.3運輸測試認證。中國出口商須持有針對具體電池配置有效的UN 38.3測試報告，並對每批次貨物符合IATA DGR（空運）或IMDG Code（海運）要求。此為兩國均適用的同一國際標準；實際差距在於文件的時效性和每批次貨物的正確危險貨物申報。
